name: Number Ticker Demo
visual_summary: A visually appealing display of a numeric value, usually used to showcase a dynamic count or progress.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Number Ticker Demo
Description: A visually appealing display of a numeric value, usually used to showcase a dynamic count or progress.
Style: dark mode enabled
Interactions: 
Tags: ticker, counter, number display

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { NumberTicker } from "@/registry/magicui/number-ticker"

export default function NumberTickerDemo() {
  return (
    <NumberTicker
      value={100}
      className="text-8xl font-medium tracking-tighter whitespace-pre-wrap text-black dark:text-white"
    />
  )
}
